metaData.Ingredients: Meat and Meat Derivatives (Poultry, Beef and/or Lamb), Cereal(s) & Vegetable(s), Fish, Vitamins & Minerals, Flavour, Thickeners, Sugars, Colour
metaData.Key Information: Fancy Feast Inspirations range is a delectable way to add texture to your cat's daily meals. Delectable chicken pieces beautifully arranged with pasta pearls and spinach tempting all of your cat's senses.
metaData.Preparation:
• Feeding guide:
1. Feed 1.5 pouches per day per kg of body weight
2. Feed up tp twice this amount to kittens
3. Pregnant or nursing cats may require 2 - 4 times their normal feeding
• Note:
1. The adult maintenance averages are based on moderately active cats at normal environmental temperatures
2. Individual needs might vary and feeding should be adjusted as required to maintain a lean, healthy body weight
3. Always provide clean, fresh drinking water
